note: Thematic groups of in-scope lessons. Each cluster is the unit processed by one /loop tick. v2 splits the original 28 clusters into 51 to keep each within RUN-CONTRACT section 7 limits (<= 3 unrelated subsystems, <= 40 file edits). work-queue.md tracks status.

clusters.name: Interface shell: document window, tab, status bar, pasteboard, color theme
clusters.description: Document window chrome: tab (name + zoom + click-to-switch), status bar (info menu, click-and-hold for image dimensions), pasteboard concept and color picker (right-click), interface color theme (4 grays, Shift+F1/F2 cycle), Menu Bar layout. Audit-style pass to verify photoweb chrome matches Photoshop.

clusters.name: Toolbar: column, hidden-tool flyout, default-tool memory, keyboard cycle
clusters.description: Toolbar interaction surface: single/double column toggle, click-and-hold + right-click flyout for hidden tools, default-tool memory (last-selected sticks), keyboard letter to select, Shift+letter to cycle, tool group ordering convention. Toolbar tools themselves are addressed in their own clusters; this cluster is the toolbar UI.

clusters.name: Panel system: groups, tabs, Window menu, panel menu icon, dock/float
clusters.description: Panel groups + tabs, Window menu list with checkmark for open panels, panel menu icon (top-right), dock / float / resize, restore default layout.

clusters.name: Screen modes: Standard / Full Screen with Menu Bar / Full Screen
clusters.description: Three screen modes via View > Screen Mode or the bottom-of-toolbar icon. F cycles forward, Shift+F cycles back. Tab toggles panel visibility.

clusters.name: Neutral Color Mode (interface distraction reduction)
clusters.description: Preferences > Interface > Neutral Color Mode toggle (CC 2022.5+) that removes cosmetic UI gradients to keep focus on the image.

clusters.name: Preferences dialog + background auto-save
clusters.description: Preferences dialog (interface, performance, cursors, units) and background auto-save (CS6+). Two related subsystems both fronted by the same dialog.

clusters.name: Navigation: Zoom Tool, Hand Tool, fit / 100%, scrubby zoom, shortcuts
clusters.description: Z (Zoom Tool), H (Hand Tool), Ctrl/Cmd+0 fit, Ctrl/Cmd+1 100%, scrubby zoom, Space-hold to temp-Hand-Tool, Ctrl+Space / Alt+Space temp-Zoom. Single subsystem with deep shortcut surface.

clusters.name: File: Open, drag-drop, Place Embedded, Load Files into Stack
clusters.description: All ways to bring image data into photoweb: File > Open (Ctrl/Cmd+O), drag-and-drop onto canvas vs onto Home Screen vs blank workspace, File > Place Embedded (adds as new layer with Free Transform pre-armed), File > Scripts > Load Files into Stack (multi-image to layered doc).

clusters.name: File > New: New Document dialog
clusters.description: Ctrl/Cmd+N New Document dialog (preset categories, custom dimensions, units, resolution, color mode, background contents), match-existing-document dimensions trick (Window > <docname>).

clusters.name: File: Save As to protect originals, Close / Close All
clusters.description: Save As workflow to avoid overwriting original (rename + JPEG quality dialog awareness), File > Close (Ctrl/Cmd+W), File > Close All (Ctrl/Cmd+Alt+W), unsaved-changes warning, tab asterisk indicator.

clusters.name: Image Size dialog: pixels, resolution, resampling
clusters.description: Image > Image Size (Ctrl/Cmd+Alt+I): pixel dimensions vs document size (print) vs resolution, link aspect ratio, interpolation modes (Nearest Neighbor for pixel art, Bicubic Sharper/Smoother, Preserve Details 2.0 for upscaling), email/web resize via Image > Duplicate then Image Size, match-existing-doc dimensions, file-size calculation. Single dialog, many cases.

clusters.name: Canvas Size (expand via Crop Tool or Image > Canvas Size)
clusters.description: Image > Canvas Size dialog (anchor-grid, relative checkbox, units, canvas extension color) and Crop Tool dragging beyond canvas edges as an alternate path. Unlocking the Background layer first.

clusters.name: Rotate canvas, Straighten Tool, Ruler-based straightening
clusters.description: Image > Image Rotation (90 CW/CCW, 180, Flip Horizontal/Vertical, Arbitrary), Crop Tool's free-rotate by clicking outside the crop border, Crop Tool's Straighten button + drag-along-horizon, Ruler Tool > Straighten Layer.

clusters.name: Crop Tool: basic crop, Classic Mode, perspective, single-layer, circular
clusters.description: Crop Tool (C): drag corners/edges, Shift constrain aspect, Alt resize-from-center, X swap orientation, Enter commit, Esc cancel, H hide overlay; Classic Mode preference (Options Bar gear); Delete Cropped Pixels toggle for non-destructive crop. Perspective Crop Tool (rotation-grid alignment). Single-layer crop via Rectangular Marquee + Image > Crop. Circular crop via Elliptical Marquee + delete outside.

clusters.name: Layers panel: rows, thumbnails, visibility, locking, opacity, blend mode dropdown, shortcuts
clusters.description: Layers panel structure (Window > Layers / F7), per-layer row (name, thumbnail, visibility eye, lock controls, opacity, blend mode), panel options (thumbnail size, no thumbnail option), add/delete/duplicate, layer thumbnail double-click to rename, Shift+Ctrl/Cmd+N New Layer with name dialog, Ctrl/Cmd+J duplicate, [ ] reorder, ; toggle eye.

clusters.name: Background layer (locked, no transparency, convert-to-normal)
clusters.description: The locked Background layer that Photoshop creates on open: italics name, lock icon, no Move Tool drag, no transparency, no reorder, no blend mode changes. Convert dialog (click lock or Layer > New > Layer from Background) auto-renames to Layer 0.

clusters.name: Layer operations: Stamp Visible, copy effects, Auto-Select, align/distribute, groups
clusters.description: Shift+Ctrl/Cmd+Alt+E Stamp Visible to a new layer; Alt-drag effects / 'Effects' name to copy effects between layers; Move Tool Auto-Select Layer toggle in Options Bar; Move Tool Align/Distribute icons (Shift-click layers first); layer groups (folder icon, Ctrl/Cmd+G group, Ctrl/Cmd+Shift+G ungroup).

clusters.name: Properties panel (per-layer-type contextual options)
clusters.description: The enhanced Properties panel surfaces per-layer-type controls: Background layer shows image-size and crop; pixel layers show transform; type layers show font controls; adjustment layers show their parameters. Distinct panel separate from Layers panel.

clusters.name: Moving images and layers between documents
clusters.description: Five ways to move a layer between open documents: Move Tool drag-and-drop (Shift to center), Select > All + Edit > Copy / Paste, Edit > Paste Special, drag layer thumbnail between Layers panels, Layer > Duplicate Layer with Destination dropdown.

clusters.name: Blend modes: dropdown, live preview hover, Shift+/- keyboard cycle
clusters.description: Layers panel Blend Mode dropdown with 27 modes (Normal, Dissolve, Darken, Multiply, ... Luminosity); Photoshop CC 2019+ hover for live preview; Shift+Plus / Shift+Minus to cycle from Move Tool or selection tools. Common recipes: Multiply for darken, Screen for lighten, Overlay/Soft Light for contrast.

clusters.name: Layer Style dialog, save/load styles, Opacity vs Fill semantics
clusters.description: fx icon at bottom of Layers panel + Layer > Layer Style menu opens the modal Layer Style dialog (Drop Shadow, Inner Shadow, Outer/Inner Glow, Bevel & Emboss, Satin, Color/Gradient/Pattern Overlay, Stroke, Blending Options). New Style button + Styles panel to save/load. Opacity reduces layer + effects together; Fill reduces layer pixels only, effects stay at full alpha.

clusters.name: Selection overview, modifier behaviors (Shift add, Alt subtract, Shift+Alt intersect)
clusters.description: Why selections matter; Shift to add to selection (cursor +), Alt/Option to subtract (cursor -), Shift+Alt to intersect (cursor x); selection vocabulary (marching ants); Select menu commands (All, Deselect, Reselect, Inverse).

clusters.name: Transform Selection (modify the marching ants, not the pixels)
clusters.description: Select > Transform Selection (or right-click in selection). Drag handles to scale the outline without affecting pixels; Shift constrain; Alt center; Options Bar W/H/X/Y readouts; Enter commit, Esc cancel.

clusters.name: Rectangular & Elliptical Marquee, M / Shift+M
clusters.description: M selects Rectangular Marquee; Shift+M toggles to Elliptical; Space-drag mid-gesture to reposition; Shift constrain to square/circle; Alt center; Options Bar Style (Normal / Fixed Ratio / Fixed Size), Feather, Anti-alias.

clusters.name: Lasso family: Freehand, Polygonal, Magnetic (L / Shift+L)
clusters.description: Lasso freehand drag; Polygonal click-to-place anchor, double-click or click-start to close; Magnetic edge-snap with Width / Contrast / Frequency in Options Bar, Caps Lock for crosshair cursor, [ ] to adjust width, Backspace to undo last anchor.

clusters.name: Magic Wand, Quick Selection, Object Selection (non-AI)
clusters.description: Three content/color-based selection tools sharing W shortcut (cycle with Shift+W): Magic Wand (Tolerance, Contiguous, Sample All Layers), Quick Selection (paint with brush; [ ] resize, Auto-Enhance), Object Selection in non-AI Rectangle / Lasso mode (drag a loose outline around the subject; cloud Object Finder mode is out of scope).

clusters.name: Color Range dialog (sampled-colors selection)
clusters.description: Select > Color Range opens a modal: Eyedropper picks sampled colors (+/-/inverse eyedroppers), Fuzziness slider, Range slider for skin/hue, Localized Color Clusters checkbox, Preview thumbnails for Grayscale / Quick Mask / On Black / On White. Distinct from Magic Wand because it builds a continuous mask, not a binary one.

clusters.name: Pen Tool selections; Curvature Pen Tool
clusters.description: Pen Tool (P) Path mode: click anchor, click-and-drag for handles, Alt to break handle, Ctrl/Cmd temp-Direct-Selection, complete path then Paths panel 'Load path as selection' or Ctrl/Cmd+Enter. Curvature Pen Tool (P, Shift+P) automatic smooth curves from clicked points.

clusters.name: Quick Mask mode and Feather with live preview
clusters.description: Q toggles Quick Mask mode (selection becomes a red overlay; paint black/white with Brush Tool to add/subtract from selection); inside Quick Mask, Gaussian Blur or Filter > Blur > Gaussian Blur on the mask gives a live-previewed feather. Q again to exit; the soft mask becomes a feathered selection.

clusters.name: Focus Area auto-selection
clusters.description: Select > Focus Area: Photoshop analyzes the image and proposes a selection of the in-focus region. View Modes (On Black/On White/On Layers, press F to cycle), In-Focus Range slider, Add/Subtract brushes for manual refinement. Output to selection / new layer / mask. Algorithmic, not ML/cloud-based.

clusters.name: Layer masks: add, paint, paste-into, view-as-mask, fake mask, masks + effects
clusters.description: Add Layer Mask icon at bottom of Layers panel (Alt-click for hide-all); paint black to hide, white to reveal, gray for partial; Alt-click mask thumbnail to view-as-grayscale, Shift-click to disable, Ctrl/Cmd-click to load as selection; paste image into mask via Alt-click then Edit > Paste; effects can render below mask or above (Create Layers vs Layer Style > Layer Mask Hides Effects); blending photos via gradient on mask; faking masks via adjustment layer's built-in mask.

clusters.name: Clipping masks (clip to layer below; photo-in-text)
clusters.description: Alt-click between two layer rows or Layer > Create Clipping Mask (Ctrl/Cmd+Alt+G): top layer becomes clipped, its visibility limited to the bottom layer's non-transparent pixels. Combine with type layer to render photo inside text.

clusters.name: Free Transform: scale / rotate / skew / distort / perspective
clusters.description: Ctrl/Cmd+T enters Free Transform with bounding box and 8 handles; drag corner to scale (Shift constrain proportions in legacy; CC 2019+ constrains by default), Alt resize-from-center; rotate by hovering just outside a corner (cursor becomes curved arrow); Shift rotate in 15-degree increments; Ctrl/Cmd-drag a corner for distort, Ctrl/Cmd+Shift-drag for skew, Ctrl/Cmd+Alt+Shift-drag for perspective; right-click for mode menu; Enter commit, Esc cancel.

clusters.name: Warp grid (enhanced Warp 2020)
clusters.description: Edit > Transform > Warp or Warp icon in Free Transform Options Bar. Default 4-corner grid; Options Bar preset (None, Arc, Bulge, Twist, etc.) or Custom; CC 2020 enhanced Warp: split lines (vertical/horizontal/cross splits to add grid divisions), per-cell handles, smooth curves. Enter commit, Esc cancel.

clusters.name: Brush Tool basics: cursor, hardness, flow, opacity, eraser-via-Clear-blend
clusters.description: B selects Brush; [ ] resize, Shift+[ ] hardness; cursor preference (Normal / Precise via Caps Lock); Options Bar Size/Hardness/Flow/Opacity; turning Brush into eraser by setting Blend Mode to Clear (CC 2020+) or just press E for Eraser. Color picking with Alt/Option-click.

clusters.name: Brush presets: define from canvas, save settings, brush library
clusters.description: Edit > Define Brush Preset to make a brush from a black-on-white 200x200 layer (grayscale becomes brush opacity); save Tool Settings (Mode, Opacity, Flow, Smoothing, color) alongside brush in the Brushes panel; Get More Brushes panel-menu item.

clusters.name: Paint Symmetry (butterfly icon)
clusters.description: Paint Symmetry on Brush, Pencil, and Eraser: Options Bar butterfly icon opens menu (None, Vertical, Horizontal, Dual Axis, Diagonal, Wavy, Circle, Spiral, Parallel Lines, Radial, Mandala). Transformable symmetry path on canvas; Enter to apply, then strokes mirror live.

clusters.name: Brushes panel dynamics: Shape, Scattering, Texture, Dual, Color, Other
clusters.description: Brushes panel tabs (click the name, not the checkbox, to view options): Shape Dynamics (size/angle/roundness with Control source: Off, Fade, Pen Pressure, Pen Tilt, Stylus Wheel); Scattering (Scatter, Count, Count Jitter, Both Axes); Texture (pattern + mode + scale + depth); Dual Brush; Color Dynamics (Foreground/Background jitter, Hue/Sat/Bright/Purity jitter); Other Dynamics (Opacity / Flow jitter with same Control sources).

clusters.name: Gradient Tool, Gradient Editor, gradient recipes
clusters.description: G selects Gradient Tool; Options Bar Type (Linear/Radial/Angle/Reflected/Diamond), gradient preset picker, Reverse / Dither / Transparency. Drag on canvas defines line; Shift constrains angle in 45-degree increments. Gradient Editor (click swatch in Options Bar) for editing stops (color, opacity, midpoint), preset save. Rainbow recipe via Black-to-White preset + hue-shift sequence.

clusters.name: Live Gradients (non-destructive gradient layer)
clusters.description: CC 2023+ Live Gradients: Options Bar Gradient Mode = Gradient creates a non-destructive Gradient Fill layer instead of pixel paint. On-canvas Gradient widget with draggable angle, start/end stops, midpoint, scale; double-click stops for color; right-click for options. Different from classic Gradient Tool (which paints pixels).

clusters.name: Eyedropper, Swatches panel, swatches-from-image
clusters.description: Eyedropper Tool (I) samples Foreground color (Alt for Background); Sample Size in Options Bar (Point Sample / 3x3 / 5x5 / etc.). Swatches panel: drag color from canvas into panel; click swatch to set Foreground (Ctrl/Cmd-click for Background); group collapse all (Ctrl/Cmd-click triangle); create swatches from an image via Filter > Pixelate > Mosaic + Eyedropper sample loop.

clusters.name: Type Tool, point/area type, Character & Paragraph panels, color picking
clusters.description: T selects Type Tool; click for point type, click-drag for area type box; Options Bar (font family/style/size, anti-alias, alignment, color); Character panel (tracking, kerning, leading, baseline shift, vertical/horizontal scale, faux bold/italic, case, super/sub); Paragraph panel (alignment, indent, space before/after, hyphenation); pick type color by sampling from image with Color Picker open (cursor becomes Eyedropper over canvas).

clusters.name: Type on a Path and Warp Text
clusters.description: Type on path: draw a path with Shape Tool in Path mode or Pen Tool, switch to Type Tool, hover until cursor changes to type-on-path icon, click to start typing along the path; Direct Selection Tool to move start/end; flip side via drag. Warp Text dialog (Options Bar T-with-arc icon): Style dropdown (Arc, Arch, Flag, Wave, Fish, Rise, Fisheye, Inflate, Squeeze, Twist), Horizontal/Vertical, Bend/Horizontal Distortion/Vertical Distortion sliders.

clusters.name: Type-in-shape (paths) and Type-to-shape conversion
clusters.description: Type inside a closed path: draw shape with Custom Shape Tool in Path mode, switch to Type Tool, click inside path, type wraps to fill it. Convert text to a vector shape via Layer > Type > Convert to Shape; afterwards edit anchors with Direct Selection Tool (cut holes, reshape letters).

clusters.name: Shape concepts: vector vs pixel, Tool Mode (Shape / Path / Pixels)
clusters.description: Shape tools' three modes in Options Bar (Shape / Path / Pixels): Shape creates a vector Shape layer (resolution-independent, editable Fill/Stroke), Path creates a Work Path (paths panel, no layer), Pixels rasterizes onto the active layer. Free Transform Path command for vector resize.

clusters.name: Rectangle, Ellipse, Triangle, Polygon, Line; combination ops
clusters.description: U selects shape tool, Shift+U cycles. Rectangle (Shift = square, Alt = center, Live Corners radius); Ellipse (Shift = circle); Triangle (Shift = equilateral, corner radius); Polygon (Sides, Star Ratio, Smooth Indents, Smooth Corners); Line (Stroke weight + color, arrowhead options); Star recipe via Polygon + Star Ratio. Shape combination ops in Options Bar: New Layer, Add (+), Subtract (-), Intersect (x), Exclude (overlapping).

clusters.name: Custom Shape Tool & Shapes panel
clusters.description: Custom Shape Tool (U, Shift+U cycle); Options Bar shape picker (gear menu to load default sets: Animals, Arrows, Banners, etc.); Shapes panel (Window > Shapes) with collapsible groups; drag shape from panel into document for a Shape layer; Shift constrain aspect.

clusters.name: Custom shape presets: define and save sets
clusters.description: Trace path with Pen Tool, Edit > Define Custom Shape to add to current preset set. Preset Manager (Edit > Presets > Preset Manager) Set Preset Type = Custom Shapes, click items, Save Set as .csh; Load to import a set; reset to defaults; rename / delete individual presets.

clusters.name: Patterns: define, fill, pattern tiles from shapes and gradients
clusters.description: Define Pattern (Edit > Define Pattern) from a 100x100 tile design; Edit > Fill > Pattern, Layer > Layer Style > Pattern Overlay, or Paint Bucket Pattern mode; tile design with guides at 50% center, repeating shapes/gradients in symmetry. Pattern Preset Manager.
